strongest_matches: Strong Python, backend, AI tooling, and ML workflow alignment through Pharmax, Haxaml, FRAME, and model training work.
Faculty is an AI-focused company, and the role sits close to applied AI, MLOps, internal tooling, and deployment systems.
London location works well, and the role fits his preferred software engineering and AI platform direction.
major_gaps: The role leans heavily into platform engineering, Kubernetes, infrastructure as code, DevSecOps, and multi-cloud delivery, which are not strongly proven in the profile.
Faculty may expect stronger production MLOps ownership than Arinze has clearly shown, especially around model monitoring and deployment tooling at team scale.
Go is listed alongside Python, and he has no confirmed Go experience.
result.summary: Software Engineer - Platform at Faculty scores 61 because Arinze has strong Python, AI, backend, and ML workflow overlap, but the role is more infrastructure and MLOps-heavy than his strongest evidence. Worth applying with a quick pack, but the application should be honest about Kubernetes, Terraform, and multi-cloud depth.
